params.TriggerDescription: Eerie — Whenever an enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, put a possession counter on CARDNAME.
Eerie — Whenever an enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, put a possession counter on CARDNAME.
When CARDNAME dies, create an X/X blue Spirit creature token with flying, where X is the number of counters on CARDNAME.
